conditions: Annual confirmation of beneficiary and protector changes

supporting_notes: Officer traced trustee, settlor, protector and beneficiaries to the control chart

evidence_export.purpose: Show trust relationship and supporting evidence in the authoritative pack

expected.elevation_reason_text: Opaque ownership floor: opaque/complex ownership requires at least HIGH final risk
expected.outcome: Trust deed and control-chain review

scenario_evidence.evidence_export_summary: Trust deed, role identities, beneficiary register and control chart verified

trust_relationship.relationship: Discretionary family trust with an independent corporate trustee
